name: user_satisfaction
description: Indicates the user's positive emotional response or enjoyment of the product.

name: audio_quality
description: Refers to the performance and clarity of the sound produced by the device.

name: connectivity
description: Describes the ease and reliability of establishing a connection with other devices.

name: utility_for_calls
description: Highlights the product's usefulness for making or receiving phone calls.
examples: extremely handy if your job requires lots of conference calls.

name: battery_life
description: Pertains to the duration the device holds a charge during use.
examples: sometimes it would not let me make it without having to charge it when walking
